/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/game/ECS/ecs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/game/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/game/world/worldgen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/renderer/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGame.dir/src/utils/utils.cpp.o -o MyGame  libglad.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a external/FastNoise2/src/libFastNoise.a _deps/freetype-build/libfreetype.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
